overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The player navigates through tunnels, overpasses, and past a massive stadium structure with vibrant pink lighting, showcasing the game's futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street leading to tunnel

events.description: entering tunnel from rain-soaked covered street
exiting tunnel to open area with tall tower visible in distance

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle through rainy streets, entering a concrete tunnel and emerging to see a massive tower in the city skyline

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning the road ahead
dark tunnel entrance with illuminated edges
smooth concrete tunnel walls with graffiti
tall futuristic skyscraper visible after tunnel exit
colorful illuminated advertisements on buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass on a rain-soaked street, enters a tunnel with smooth concrete walls, then exits to reveal a towering skyscraper in the distance. The motorcycle drives steadily through the wet urban environment with neon signs visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial intersection with neon signage

events.description: turning right at intersection while navigating through wet streets
passing through intersection with traffic lights visible

agents.ego_description: navigating urban intersections, turning right and passing commercial buildings with bright neon billboards and palm trees lining the streets

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead on the wet road, maintaining distance from ego

entered.detail: multi-story buildings with illuminated windows and signage
large digital advertisement screens with bright colors
road intersection with traffic control lights
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
modern glass facade building rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving through open urban streets after exiting the tunnel, the scene features commercial buildings with bright neon billboards on the right and palm trees on the left. The motorcycle turns right at an intersection, passing other vehicles while the city tower remains visible in the background.

events.description: entering highway section with illuminated green lane markers
passing under large overpass structure temporarily blocking sky view

agents.ego_description: accelerating on a multi-lane highway section, passing under several overpasses with green illuminated lane markers visible on the road

entered.detail: elevated highway structure crossing perpendicular to the road
illuminated green lines marking the edges of driving lanes
large electronic advertisement displays on building facades
tall concrete walls with graffiti and weather stains
low-rise industrial structures with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a highway section with distinctive green illuminated lane markers. The motorcycle passes under multiple overpasses while concrete retaining walls line the left side and digital billboards illuminate the right. The environment feels more industrial with fewer commercial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium district with massive illuminated structure

events.description: massive stadium structure with pink neon lights becomes visible on the left
driving alongside and passing the stadium structure on the left

agents.ego_description: navigating curved wet roads alongside a massive stadium with vibrant pink neon lighting, passing parked vehicles while maintaining speed

notable_agents.action: dark colored car driving parallel to ego on the left side of the road

entered.detail: massive circular stadium with intricate metal framework and pink neon illumination
vibrant pink and purple LED strips outlining the stadium architecture
row of low-rise commercial buildings with various signage
cars parked along the left curb near the stadium

segments.scene_description: The segment features the dramatic appearance of a massive stadium with vibrant pink neon lighting on the left side. The motorcycle curves along the wet road, passing parked cars and driving alongside the illuminated structure. Commercial buildings line the right side while the stadium dominates the left, creating a striking visual contrast against the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban arterial road with sparse development

events.description: leaving stadium district for more open suburban area with less dense buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing down wet roads past the stadium district, entering a less dense suburban area with palm trees and chain-link fences lining the streets

entered.detail: low-rise residential and commercial structures with subdued lighting
metal chain-link fencing running along the left side of the road
wooden utility poles with power lines stretching along the road
hazy mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stadium, the environment opens up into a more suburban setting with lower buildings, chain-link fences, and utility poles lining the road. The pink neon glow fades as the motorcycle continues through the rain-soaked streets, with distant mountains barely visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined concrete underpass into a sprawling, neon-lit industrial highway. It begins by gliding through a smooth concrete tunnel on a rain-soaked street before exiting to reveal a towering skyscraper dominating the distant skyline. As the motorcycle moves into the open urban center, the environment shifts to a mix of bright commercial billboards and roadside palm trees, leading the camera through a right-hand turn at a busy intersection. The scene then transitions from the commercial district onto a highway characterized by green illuminated lane markers and heavy concrete retaining walls. Finally, the view opens up under a series of overpasses, where the vibrant city lights give way to a more industrial atmosphere lined with digital billboards.

The shot follows a continuous ride through a rain-soaked city that transitions from a neon-drenched urban center to a muted suburban periphery. It begins with the motorcycle curving along a wet road, dominated on the left by the dramatic, vibrant pink glow of a massive stadium while commercial buildings line the right. As the bike moves past the illuminated structure, the intense neon lighting gradually fades and the dense city architecture gives way to a more open environment. The scene then shifts toward a suburban setting characterized by lower buildings, chain-link fences, and utility poles lining the street. Finally, the camera continues through the rain-soaked haze, revealing distant mountains barely visible on the horizon.
